title: Nondestructive Mobile pest and disease detection technologies for crop protection
subtitle: Zerstörungsfreie mobile Schädlings- und Krankheitserkennungstechnologien für den Pflanzenschutz
description: A practice abstract detailing non-destructive mobile technologies and smartphone applications for detecting pests and diseases in vegetable crop protection. It highlights tools such as Plantix, Cropalyzer, and Agri Tech for efficient monitoring and decision-support to assist small-scale farmers in open-field and greenhouse environments.
